old_value: {"id":"broadside-kv75.2","title":"MEDIUM: Missing security response headers","description":"File: server.rs (all handlers). No X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff, X-Frame-Options: DENY, Referrer-Policy, Cache-Control, or Content-Security-Policy headers on any HTTP response. Enables MIME sniffing attacks on media, clickjacking on profile/index pages, and URL leakage via Referer. Fix: add an axum middleware layer that sets security headers on all responses.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"mark@reviewcommit.com","created_at":"2026-07-18T17:08:31.150937106Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-18T17:08:31.150937106Z","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"broadside-kv75.2","depends_on_id":"broadside-kv75","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-18T17:08:31.161957829Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}

new_value: Added security_headers middleware: X-Content-Type-Options nosniff, X-Frame-Options DENY, Referrer-Policy same-origin, CSP default-src none, Cache-Control no-store.
